title: Slurp Bags
description: Ever had too many seeds or flowers in your inventory at once? Use these bags to slurp up all of your seeds into a single inventory slot!
body:
Ever had too many seeds or flowers in your inventory at once? Use these bags to slurp up all of your items into a single inventory slot!

**Current bag types:**

- Seed
- Flower
- Dye
- Sapling
- Leaf

Each bag can be in one of three **slurp modes**:

- **On Pickup** - items will automatically go into the bag when you pick them up
- **Always** - items will go into the bag anytime they are in your inventory outside the bag
- **Disabled** - the bag works like a simple backpack

In addition, each bag can be **dyed** to help you tell the difference between them!
